title: Andre Raw — The Framework Already Running in Production Software
summary: Working production system (Comeketo Catering, sales rep Andre Raw) that instantiates the framework's philosophy as deployed software: Close CRM ingestion → oracle layer → live state → supabase + render + docker. Decision Intent and Primary Comparator are first-class UI dropdowns — the anchor/comparator discipline operationalized. Four screenshots of the same lead under four regimes produce four different rankings, scores, and algebra breakdowns: system refuses single universal ranking. Algebra Contributions panel surfaces sore-thumb variables with signed weights per decision. Typed abstention gate: 'verify latest Close activity before executing, then keep Andre as final human approver.' Runs 8 of the 10 consciousness-for-AI modules at smaller scale (Unified World Model, Self-Model, Attention-as-Selection, Predictive Processing, Temporal Continuity, Metacognition, Action Selection + Narrative Closure, Global Availability). Missing: Interoception/Affect, Social Cognition Turned Inward — the natural next build. Framework is philosophically coherent + computationally demonstrated + now commercially validated at ≥1 deployment. Vocabulary-cleanup constraint: the Andre system uses 'anchor' and 'comparator' in operational UI senses that can't be broken by rename work.
